summary: Created convex/actions/agent/agents/enrichmentAgent.ts with executeEnrichmentAgent, buildEnrichmentPrompt, 7 tool definitions (all parallelSafe), executeEnrichmentTool dispatcher, and 7 tool handler functions extracted from ridePlanningAgent.ts. Short-circuits with not_applicable when no route exists. Uses Haiku model with maxSteps:4, timeoutMs:30_000. Forwards only onAgentTurn and onToolResultPiMessage callbacks. Sub-agent receives no conversation history.
